nodes.name: Read Feedback Log
nodes.notes: CONFIGURE: Set fileSelector to the absolute path of memory/feedback_log.json on your machine

nodes.name: Call Claude API
nodes.notes: CONFIGURE: Add your Anthropic API key as an HTTP Header Auth credential with name 'x-api-key'

nodes.name: Write Suggestions
nodes.notes: CONFIGURE: Set fileName to the absolute path of memory/suggestions.json on your machine
